_comment: Master JSON schema for deal-package skill. Superset of all artifact field requirements. v2.1 adds dps section for Deal Pricing Sheet generation and sku field to pricing roles.

tdr._comment: Fields for sd-technical-deal-review template {{placeholder}} replacement. See sd-technical-deal-review/SKILL.md for formatting rules.
our_understanding_current_state: **Issue Title**: Brief description (MAX 100 chars each, 5-6 items)

cover._comment: Fields for PPTX Cover slide — generate_tdr.py populates title, subtitle, author, date.

gantt._comment: Fields for PPTX slide 8 (Gantt) and HTML timeline — post-processing generates bars.

outcomes._comment: Slide 6: Outcomes — strategic/business and technical outcomes. Two-column layout.
outcomes.subtitle: Expected strategic and technical outcomes from this engagement.
strategic_outcomes: **Business Outcome Title**: measurable business result (MAX 100 chars each, 3-5 items)
technical_outcomes: **Technical Outcome Title**: specific technical deliverable or capability (MAX 100 chars each, 3-5 items)

scope_by_role._comment: Slide 8: Scope by Role — SA and SDM activity breakdown. SKIP audience.
sa_activities: **Activity Title**: description of SA deliverable (MAX 100 chars each, 5-8 items)
sdm_activities: **Activity Title**: description of SDM responsibility (MAX 100 chars each, 4-6 items)

tech_review._comment: Slide 9: Technical Review Outcome — placeholder for tech reviewer. SKIP audience. Auto-generated with section headers; no user input needed.

milestones._comment: Slide 11: Milestones & Validation — SMART milestones with acceptance criteria.

items.acceptance_criteria: Schema deployed to DEV, validated by SME review

raci._comment: Slide 12: Detailed RACI — 3-column format (Activity / Snowflake / Customer). Add partner column only if si_partner is set.

team_structure._comment: Slide 14: Team Structure & Accountability Plan — named roles and reporting lines.

roles.title: Solutions Architect
roles.name: TBD
roles.responsibilities: Technical lead — architecture, design, implementation advisory

roles.title: Service Delivery Manager
roles.name: TBD
roles.responsibilities: Project governance, status reporting, risk management

staffing_plan._comment: Slide 16: Staffing Plan — role-by-week hour allocation grid. SKIP audience. Auto-derived from pricing + gantt if not explicitly provided.

pricing._comment: Fields for PPTX slide 12 (Pricing) and HTML proposal Delivery Team section.

dps._comment: Fields specific to Deal Pricing Sheet generation. Only populated when DPS is being generated (not pre-existing). If user already has a DPS, set pricing.pricing_sheet_link instead.

economic_review_answers._comment: Yes/No answers for Economic Review Summary tab (I4:I9). Auto-derived from deal context.

html_proposal._comment: Fields specific to the one-page HTML proposal that are not in the TDR schema.
html_proposal.summary_paragraph: 2-3 sentence engagement overview for the HTML proposal header area.

pain_points.title: Semantic Fragmentation
pain_points.description: 717 LookML definitions across 31 projects with no single source of truth.

deliverables.title: Healthcare Ontology
bullets: **Formal ontology schema** — ONTOLOGY_CLASSES, PROPERTIES, RELATIONSHIPS as native Snowflake tables
**8+ healthcare classes** — Patient, Provider, Encounter, Diagnosis, Procedure, Payor, Member, Facility

engagement_type_qualifier.text: The outcomes above represent target deliverables based on current understanding. Actual throughput may vary depending on data readiness, access to SMEs, and evolving priorities.

why_ps.title: Platform-Native Expertise
why_ps.description: Designed by the platform team with deep product knowledge.

assumptions: Read access to source data systems
out_of_scope: Migration of all LookML definitions beyond Phase 1

timeline_embed._comment: Timeline display options for the embedded timeline in the HTML proposal and PPTX Gantt slide. NOT a standalone artifact.
